title: Courts wary of removing arbitrators as many are former judges: Supreme Court Justice BV Nagarathna
description: Courts are often reluctant to remove arbitrators accused of misconduct since many arbitrators are former judges, Supreme Court Justice BV Nagarathna said on Saturday.She also highlighted structural gaps in India’s arbitration framework, particularly the absence of a dedicated forum to examine complaints against arbitrators.“There is no forum as such where a misconduct of an arbitrator is complained against except before a court.
